scripts.test:sequence: npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && npx playwright test tests/login-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && npx playwright test tests/forgot-password.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && npx playwright test tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:sequence:no-deprecation: set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:all:no-deprecation: set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:report: set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test --reporter=html && npx playwright show-report artifacts\playwright-report
